name: file-watcher
description: Monitors directories for new or modified files. Supports local, NFS, and SMB mounts with glob patterns, regex filters, size/age constraints, debounce, and post-action rules.
author: hermes-core

watch_root.title: Watch Root Directory
watch_root.description: Absolute base directory path to watch. Recipe path filters are applied relative to this root.

access_mode.title: Access Mode
access_mode.description: Filesystem access method; use nfs or smb for network-mounted shares

poll_interval.title: Poll Interval
poll_interval.description: Duration between directory scan cycles in Go-style duration syntax (e.g. 10s, 1m)

debounce_ms.title: Debounce (ms)
debounce_ms.description: Time in milliseconds to wait after the last detected change before emitting a file event (prevents partial-write noise)

pattern.title: File Glob Pattern
pattern.description: Glob pattern matched against file names within the watch root (e.g. *.csv, data_*.json)

recursive.title: Recursive
recursive.description: Descend into subdirectories when scanning for files

max_depth.title: Max Depth
max_depth.description: Maximum directory depth to recurse (0 = watch root only, -1 = unlimited). Only used when recursive is true.

path_filter_regex.title: Path Filter Regex
path_filter_regex.description: Regular expression matched against the full relative file path. Only files whose path matches are emitted.

filename_filter_regex.title: Filename Filter Regex
filename_filter_regex.description: Regular expression matched against the file name only (no directory component)

min_size_bytes.title: Minimum File Size (bytes)
min_size_bytes.description: Skip files smaller than this size in bytes (0 = no minimum)

max_size_bytes.title: Maximum File Size (bytes)
max_size_bytes.description: Skip files larger than this size in bytes (0 = no maximum)

min_age_seconds.title: Minimum File Age (seconds)
min_age_seconds.description: Only emit files whose last-modified time is at least this many seconds in the past (0 = no minimum age)

exclude_patterns.title: Exclude Patterns
exclude_patterns.description: List of glob patterns for files or directories to exclude from scanning

ordering.title: File Ordering
ordering.description: Order in which matched files are emitted to downstream processors

completion_check.title: Completion Check
completion_check.description: Strategy to verify a file is fully written before emitting it

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.description: Method used to determine when a file is safe to process

stable_seconds.title: Stable Duration (seconds)
stable_seconds.description: Number of seconds the file size must remain unchanged before it is considered complete (SIZE_STABLE strategy)

marker_suffix.title: Marker File Suffix
marker_suffix.description: File extension appended to the data file name that signals write completion (MARKER_FILE strategy, e.g. .done, .ready)

post_action.title: Post-Processing Action
post_action.description: Action taken on a file after it has been successfully emitted and acknowledged

action.title: Action
action.description: What to do with the file after successful processing

move_target.title: Move Target Directory
move_target.description: Absolute or watch-root-relative directory to move processed files into (MOVE action)
